newsSince: No NEW material company-specific news since June 9. The relevant items predate the window: FY2025 results (Apr 10) and FY2026 guidance for +26.8% operating-profit growth, with management flagging an AI-semiconductor-driven ~20% Q4 order surge in Motion Control. Next earnings Jul 3, 2026.

sources.label: Yaskawa FY2025 earnings call / FY2026 guidance (BigGo Finance)

verdicts.rankRationale: Latent-alpha lens: Yaskawa is explicitly an 'obvious beneficiary' / known automation cyclical, so the AI linkage is not hidden. No new evidence since June 9; the AI-capex Motion Control tailwind was already public from the April call. Hold the tail rank ~80.
verdicts.bull: FY2026 guidance +26.8% OP; AI-semi capex lifting Motion Control orders; servo/robot recovery and China rebound optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Cyclical recovery already in guidance; AI exposure indirect and widely known; awaiting Jul 3 print.
verdicts.bear: Large-project robotics carry low value-add; cyclicality and crowded automation narrative cap latent alpha at +44% YTD.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Jul 3 Q1 print / continued AI-driven Motion Control order momentum.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Automation cyclicality; low-margin large robotics projects.
